RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.P_mineralization module

RUFAS SurPhos

File name: P_mineralization.py

Author(s): DR. Peter A. Vadas

USDA-ARS Dairy Forage Research Center E-mail: peter.vadas@ars.usda.gov

Coder(s): Jacob Johnson jacob8399@gmail.com

William Donovan wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.P_mineralization.update_all(soil, time)
Description:

computes P flux between labile and active P pools “pseudocode_soil” S.5.E

Args:

soil: instance of the Soil class specified in soil.py time: instance of the Time class specified in classes.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.erosion module

RUFAS

File name: erosion.py

Author(s): DR. Melissa Motew

USDA-ARS Dairy Forage Research Center

Coder(s): Jacob Johnson jacob8399@gmail.com

William Donovan wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.erosion.update_all(soil)
Description:

TODO: Peter was skeptical about the compatibility of this module with SurPhos Calculates sediment P transported in runoff using SWAT “pseudocode_soil” S.5.F

Args:

soil: instance of the Soil class specified in soil.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.fert_leach module

RUFAS SurPhos

File name: fert_leach.py

Author(s): DR. Peter A. Vadas

USDA-ARS Dairy Forage Research Center E-mail: peter.vadas@ars.usda.gov

Coder(s): Jacob Johnson jacob8399@gmail.com

William Donovan wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.fert_leach.update_all(soil, weather, time)
Description:

estimates P leaching from surface fertilizer with rainfall and P infiltration into soil and loss in runoff “pseudocode_soil” S.5.C

Args:

soil: instance of the Soil class specified in soil.py weather: instance of the Weather class specified in classes.py time: instance of the Time class specified in classes.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.manure_leach module

RUFAS SurPhos

File name: manure_leach.py

Author(s): DR. Peter A. Vadas

USDA-ARS Dairy Forage Research Center E-mail: peter.vadas@ars.usda.gov

Coder(s): Jacob Johnson jacob8399@gmail.com

William Donovan wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.manure_leach.update_all(soil, field_management, weather, time)
Description:

this subroutine estimates P leaching from surface manure with rainfall and P infiltration into soil and loss in runoff “pseudocode_soil” S.5.D

Args:

soil: instance of the Soil class specified in soil.py field_management: instance of the FieldManagement class specified in

field_management.py

weather: instance of the Weather class specified in classes.py time: instance of the Time class specified in classes.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.phosphorus_cycling module

RUFAS: Ruminant Farm Systems Model

phosphorus_cycling.py

Author(s): Jacob Johnson jacob8399@gmail.com

William Donovan wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.phosphorus_cycling.update_all(soil, field_management, weather, time)
Description:

Runs the phosphorus cycling sub-module. Currently largely based on Peter Vadas’ SurPhos

Args:

soil: instance of the Soil class specified in soil.py field_management: instance of the FieldManagement class

specified in field_management.py

weather: instance of the Weather class specified in classes.py time: instance of the Time class specified in classes.py

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.phosphorus_cycling.update_annual_P(soil)
RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.phosphorus_cycling.update_profile_P(soil, field_management)

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.soluble_P module

RUFAS SurPhos

File name: soluble_P.py

Author(s): DR. Peter A. Vadas

USDA-ARS Dairy Forage Research Center E-mail: peter.vadas@ars.usda.gov

Coder(s): Jacob Johnson jacob8399@gmail.com

William Donovan wmdonovan@wisc.edu

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.phosphorus_cycling.soluble_P.update_all(soil)
Description:

calculates the transfer of phosphorus through hydrological processes “pseudocode_soil” S.5.B

Args:

soil: an instance of the Soil class specified in soil.py
